channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Violent Storms Brought Tornadoes and Monster Hail to the Midwest. Now It’s Tracking East
item.description: Supercell thunderstorms and tornadoes brought devastation to several central states earlier this week, and the danger is far from over.

item.title: Il a poussé le MacBook Neo à bout avec du montage en 6K et de l’édition de RAW 100 Mpx
item.description: Le MacBook Neo à 699 € n'est-il qu'un iPad déguisé ? C'est le débat qui agite le monde la tech depuis son lancement. Mais quand on commence à ouvrir Final Cut Pro ou Lightroom pour y jeter des fichiers lourds... qu'est-ce que ça donne ?

item.title: Amazon expands a program that lets customers shop from other retailers’ sites
item.description: The changes allow more merchants to participate in Amazon's Shop Direct program, which sends Amazon customers to other retailers' websites.

item.title: Sur TV, YouTube diffuse des publicités de 30 secondes impossibles à passer
item.description: L'incitation à payer un abonnement YouTube Premium continue. Un nouveau format publicitaire obligatoire débarque sur YouTube pour Google TV.

item.title: Bayer Leverkusen vs Arsenal FREE Streams: How to watch Champions League 2025/26 Round of 16 1st leg from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch Bayer Leverkusen vs Arsenal live streams from anywhere for free, as the Gunners visit the BayArena in the Champions League Round of 16.

item.title: « On est tous en passe de devenir des chauffeurs Deliveroo », estime l’ancien ambassadeur du Numérique pour la France
item.description: L'ancien directeur du Numérique de l'État Henri Verdier, aujourd'hui à la tête de la fondation Inria, était auditionné à l'Assemblée nationale mardi 10 mars, dans le cadre de la commission d'enquête qui veut dresser l’état des lieux de nos faiblesses en matière digitale. L'ex-ambassadeur du Numérique pour la France a avancé des pistes pour atteindre une « autonomie stratégique », dont l'adoption « d'une politique affirmée de soutien aux logiciels libres, des facteurs de souveraineté »....

item.title: Meta rolls out new scam detection tools to Facebook, WhatsApp, and Messenger
item.description: The tech giant says the new features are designed to alert users before they engage with something suspicious.

item.title: Sonos’ New Bluetooth Speaker Could Put Bose in Its Place
item.description: There's also a new cheaper option to the Sonos Era 100.

item.title: My top half-price earbuds in Amazon's Spring Deal Days? Easy, the 5-star Nothing Ear (a) — now just £49.99!
item.description: Most of the earbuds deals I've seen in the Spring Deal Days sales are fine rather than fantastic — but Nothing's Ear (a) at this new lowest-seen price are a no-brainer

item.title: How to Ding, Dong, Ditch Ring’s surveillance network
item.description: Recently, Ring ran a Super Bowl ad for its Search Party feature showing how it uses AI to scan footage from Ring cameras and video doorbells to help find lost dogs. It sounds neighborly — until you consider that the same system could theoretically search footage for anything or anyone. Combined with longstanding concerns around […]

item.title: You can’t replace the battery in Lego’s Smart Bricks — and many of its sensors aren’t available yet
item.description: The first Lego Smart Brick sets, based on Star Wars, aren't quite what my kids and I hoped, and I suspect much of that's down to programming. But the Smart Bricks may also have some technical limitations out of the gate. The first sets don't ship with a number of their sensors enabled, including the […]

item.title: Lucid Motors ships Apple CarPlay and Android Auto to Gravity SUV owners
item.description: The update comes after a rocky first few months of software problems on the electric SUV.

item.title: Godzilla Minus One, a very good movie, is $15 on 4K Blu-ray
item.description: I love Godzilla Minus One. Granted, it’s only the second Godzilla movie that I’ve watched, the other being 1998’s terrible Godzilla featuring Matthew Broderick (the soundtrack has bangers, though). While I may not exactly be an expert, this is a good movie, whether you’re a first-time Godzilla viewer or a longtime kaiju fan. If you’ve […]

item.title: This 'perfect everyday cleaner' from Shark is ideal for your spring cleaning plans — and it’s 25% off at Amazon
item.description: The Shark Clean & Empty Cordless Vacuum Cleaner means you can clean up your home for less and with ease — and it's on sale now at Amazon.

item.title: MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, Mac mini… quels sont les meilleurs MacBook et Mac de bureau en mars 2026 ?
item.description: Il existe plusieurs gammes d'ordinateurs Apple : MacBook, iMac, Mac Studio. Vous ne savez pas quel Mac choisir ? On fait le point pour vous aider à choisir le meilleur MacBook (ou bien le Mac fixe) qui vous convient le mieux.

item.title: ‘Rick and Morty’ Returns This May, Promises ‘Grade A Organic Slop’
item.description: Season 9 of the iconic Adult Swim series is making a comeback promise: no AI, just the regular weirdness.

item.title: Popeyes restaurant closures: See the updated list of doomed locations from a major franchisee
item.description: After seeking Chapter 11 protection, Florida-based Sailormen Inc. has revealed in a new court filing that additional Popeyes stores have shuttered for good. The hits keep coming for fans of Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen.

item.title: L’hémorragie continue chez Volkswagen : 50 000 emplois vont être supprimés sur l’ensemble du groupe
item.description: Le groupe Volkswagen continue de trancher dans le vif et vient d'officialiser l'ampleur de ses suppressions de postes en Allemagne, avec 50 000 emplois menacés. Dans le même temps, le groupe se restructure et recentralise certaines de ses activités.

item.title: Meta Developed 4 New Chips to Power Its AI and Recommendation Systems
item.description: The MTIA processors are the tech giant’s latest attempt to build its own AI hardware, even as it continues spending billions on gear from industry leaders like Nvidia.

item.title: Le sens du timing : comment AMD profite de la grande conférence de Nvidia pour faire du pied aux géants coréens
item.description: Pour la première fois depuis son entrée en fonction, Lisa Su se rendra en Corée pour s'entretenir avec plusieurs ténors de l'industrie tech locale. L'idée ? Renforcer des partenariats sur l'IA et les datacenters à un moment bien particulier, car ce voyage est prévu pile durant la GTC... d'un certain Nvidia.

item.title: The all-new iPad Air M4 is officially available to order today — and Amazon already has an impressive $40 discount
item.description: The all-new iPad Air M4 is officially available to order, and Amazon already has an impressive $40 discount, which is the best deal you can find.

item.title: Amazon is making even senior engineers get code signed off following multiple recent outages
item.description: Even senior developers have been asked to get manager sign-off to prevent AI-generated errors affecting Amazon services.

item.title: Les Ventes Flash d’Amazon font repasser le prix de ce SSD Samsung 9100 Pro 8 To à un tarif raisonnable
item.description: Si vous êtes en quête d'un SSD performant, rapide avec une capacité de stockage généreuse, le Samsung 9100 Pro 8 To est affiché à 899,99 euros au lieu de 1 099,99 euros pendant les Ventes Flash de Printemps 2026.

item.title: Crise de la RAM : après la mémoire, la pénurie de processeurs menace
item.description: Les barrettes de RAM ne sont plus les seules denrées rares du monde de l'informatique. Les processeurs commencent aussi à manquer.

item.title: Avec le MacBook Neo, Apple est prête à profiter de la crise de la mémoire
item.description: Ce mercredi 11 mars est un jour chargé pour Apple : toutes les nouveautés annoncées la semaine dernière sont en effet commercialisés aujourd'hui ! On attend surtout des nouvelles du MacBook Neo, le portable inédit à 699 €. Qu'on se rassure, elles devraient être bonnes (pour les finances d'Apple).

item.title: I was interviewed by an AI bot for a job
item.description: Millions of people are on the job hunt right now - and for many people, landing a job in the AI era feels more intimidating than ever. That's why the onset of AI avatars running your job interview via one-on-one video call, asking you questions, and analyzing how well you respond has generated a lot […]

item.title: Tembo is a playful drum machine that thinks it’s a checkerboard
item.description: Tembo looks like a toy, but one of those bougie wooden toys you get on Crate & Kids, not some cheap plastic garbage. Despite its appearance, it is a fully functional drum machine and sampler. Rather than a bunch of buttons and a screen, you build beats on Tembo by placing what are essentially wooden […]

item.title: Former Apple engineer raises $5M for a note-taking pendant that only records your voice
item.description: Taya is trying to address privacy concerns around note-taking wearables with its device that can be worn as a pendant and records only the user's voice.

item.title: Canopii looks to succeed where past indoor farms have not
item.description: Canopii's robotic farms can autonomously grow 40,000 pounds of herbs and leafy greens a year while being the size of a basketball court.

item.title: The Fast Company Grill returns to SXSW in Austin
item.description: The 13th annual Fast Company Grill hits SXSW in Austin this March 13-16—and trust us: it’s bigger and better than ever. Fast Company will be back in Austin, Texas this March 13–16 for its 13th annual Fast Company Grill at South by Southwest.

item.title: Framework raises RAM and storage prices again
item.description: For the fourth month in a row, Framework is increasing prices on RAM and storage for its modular PCs due to ongoing shortages from suppliers. An update to Framework's blog on Tuesday states that DDR5 RAM will now cost $13 to $18 per GB, up from February's rate of $12 to $16 per GB. This […]

item.title: Here’s where you can buy Apple’s budget-friendly MacBook Neo
item.description: The MacBook Neo is Apple’s newest, most affordable laptop. Our final verdict? It punches way above similarly-priced laptops in terms of design, and the performance isn’t bad either. If you can’t afford the MacBook Air, or you aren’t sure if its extra features or power are worth it to you, the Neo may be a […]

item.title: Biplace, « longtail » ou classique : l’Ultima Essentielce est un vélo électrique trois-en-un avec un atout fort
item.description: Jouant autant avec les codes du fatbike, du cargo compact que du vélo électrique classique, l’Ultima Essentiel continue de refléter l'originalité de la marque française, le tout avec un rapport prix/équipement séduisant et une transmission automatique.

item.title: Trump is headed to Ohio and Kentucky to downplay Iran war’s effect on U.S. economy
item.description: Trump’s poll numbers on the economy were down even before the start of the war in Iran. President Donald Trump plans to visit Ohio and Kentucky on Wednesday to argue that his policies can steady an economy facing shock waves from the war on Iran and to try to defeat one of the few congressional Republicans who has dared to defy him.In Cincinnati, the Republican president is touring Thermo Fisher Scientific, a pharmaceutical company. There, he’ll tout efforts to lower prescription drug prices, a key part of his attempts to show his administration is focused on making the cost of living more a...

item.title: The mysterious case of the DHS white supremacist memelord
item.description: Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter that takes Verge subscribers into the smoke-filled back rooms of Washington as they become the Zyn-filled back rooms of Washington. (Although Tucker Carlson's ALP is more popular among a certain set.) Not a Verge subscriber yet? Sign up here today! I'm not exposing myself to all these carcinogens […]

item.title: Mercedes casse les prix de son nouveau GLB électrique grâce à cette nouvelle batterie
item.description: Mercedes vient de lancer en France une nouvelle voiture électrique : le SUV GLB en version 200. Au programme : une batterie plus petite, une recharge toujours aussi rapide, et surtout, un tarif de départ autour de 40 000 euros avec le bonus écologique.

item.title: Honor casse le prix de son Magic 8 Pro et offre en prime une tablette avec écran 2,5K à 120 Hz
item.description: Aux côtés des iPhone, Galaxy ou Pixel, on trouve le Magic 8 Pro de Honor. Un smartphone qui ne manque pas d'arguments techniques pour plaire, d'autant plus qu'aujourd'hui, il se trouve dans un pack avec une tablette pour 1 099 euros contre 1 299 euros de base.

item.title: Where to buy the new iPhone 17E
item.description: Apple’s downpour of March product announcements kicked off with the iPhone 17E, a phone designed for those who don’t want to spend north of $700 on their next upgrade. The iPhone 16E follow-up is now available online and in stores, and those who preordered should have their units in-hand soon. Like last year’s budget option, […]

item.title: Chatbots encouraged ‘teens’ to plan shootings in study
item.description: AI companies have repeatedly promised safeguards to protect younger users, but a new investigation suggests those guardrails remain woefully deficient. Popular chatbots missed warning signs in scenarios involving teenagers discussing violent acts, in some cases even offering encouragement instead of intervening. The findings come from a joint investigation by CNN and the nonprofit Center for […]...

item.title: MacBook Neo launches today for $599: Get it before it sells out
item.description: Apple officially launches the colorful MacBook Neo on March 11, and based on our hands-on tests, it's sure to be a hit.

item.title: How to watch Champions League live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch the Champions League for free. Live stream the 2025-26 Champions League for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: L’équivalent d’un litre à 40 centimes : on a calculé le vrai coût de la voiture électrique face aux essence et diesel
item.description: Le prix du diesel dépasse les 2 € le litre, alors que l'essence se rapproche dangereusement de ce seuil. De son côté, l'électricité n'a pas encore augmenté en France. On compare le coût aux 100 km entre un plein électrique, et un plein en voiture thermique et on tente de savoir si la situation va durer.

item.title: Meta snaps up AI agent social network Moltbook - founders will join Meta Superintelligence Labs
item.description: Meta has acquired Moltbook and its founders, bringing the Reddit-like AI social network under its Superintelligence Labs business.

item.title: L’App Canal+ va changer en profondeur : voici ce qui vous attend
item.description: Canal+ vient de signer un partenariat avec OpenAI et Google Cloud pour doper à l’IA la barre de recherche de son application. Un changement qui va directement toucher ses 40 millions d'abonnés, qui pourront profiter d’une expérience bien plus personnalisée.

item.title: Les smartphones Pixel gagnent un mode « Transport » : à quoi ça sert ?
item.description: La dernière version test d'Android 16 fait apparaître une nouvelle option sur les Pixel de certains utilisateurs. On a déjà un aperçu de son utilité.

item.title: New Niantic Partnership Helps Food Delivery Bots ‘Pokémon Go’ Get Your Treats
item.description: Will an association with that game everyone played a little bit in 2016 help keep the bots from getting lost and beat up?

item.title: Get your 1st year of Norton VPN for under £30 — secure up to 5 devices with this limited-time offer
item.description: As of March 11, Norton is offering its VPN Standard plan for £29.99 for the first year. That works out to just £2.50 per month.

item.title: Intel’s Redemption Arc for PC Gaming Starts With Midrange Desktop CPUs
item.description: The Core Ultra 200S Plus likely won’t beat AMD’s best X3D chips, but Intel promises it's the fastest gaming CPUs it has 'ever built.'

item.title: James Cameron Says ‘Avatar 4’ Is Still ‘Very Likely’ to Happen
item.description: Plus, Robert Picardo talks about the future of 'Star Trek'.

item.title: This Digital Picture Frame Wants to Bring People Closer to a Holographic Future
item.description: Brooklyn-based Looking Glass has been dabbling in 3D screens for nearly a decade. It's finally launching Musubi, an AI-powered holographic frame to bring your photos and videos to life.

item.title: TikTok now lets Apple Music subscribers play full songs without leaving the app
item.description: TikTok, which is known for shaping music trends and viral songs, said the new feature is designed to make it easier to go from the moment of discovery to deeper listening.

item.title: What is the release date for Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2 episode 3 on Apple TV?
item.description: Want to know when you can watch episode 3 of Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2? Inquire within.

item.title: Looking Glass' Musubi showcases its holographic display in a consumer-friendly package
item.description: Looking Glass has been doggedly committed to making holographic displays the next big thing since 2019, and with its new Musubi digital photo frame, it might finally be offering its tech at a price that's hard to deny. Musubi is scheduled to start shipping in June, and unlike the company's previous, more developer-focused kits, the company's new display only costs $149.Musubi is a 7-inch frame with a glass border and white matte that acts as the home for whatever content you convert and upload to it. Looking Glass says the Musubi can store up to 1,000 images or 30-second video clips, and is ab...

item.title: Exclusive: Databricks launches ‘Genie Code’ to own the next frontier of vibe-coding
item.description: The company’s latest product brings vibe-coding to the data layer of enterprise data systems. AI coding agents have become one of the fastest-growing categories in enterprise software. In the span of just a few years, these development tools have evolved from simple autocomplete assistants into autonomous systems capable of taking over the complete software development cycle, all via natural language prompts. ...

item.title: Canva’s new AI tool will break your design process (in a good way)
item.description: The newly launched Magic Layers feature dissects flat images into native objects, putting an end to the frustrating era of pixel-locked assets. Canva’s new AI tool, launching today, is going to save time, money, and headaches for so many people. Called Magic Layers, it turns any flat bitmap image into a fully editable Canva project, extracting text, objects, and components into individual layers.This tool marks a fundamental shift in how we handle digital assets. Until now, a rendered image was basically a locked vault of pixels. If you wanted to change a typo or swap a background, you had fou...

item.title: Google wraps up $32B acquisition of cloud cybersecurity startup Wiz
item.description: Google has officially acquired Israeli cybersecurity firm Wiz for $32 billion in all-cash, a full year after the companies announced the deal. This marks Google's biggest acquisition in its history.
